message:
fix: align all crates for consistent compilation

Synchronize 35 source files across fsqlite-{vdbe,types,core,mvcc,btree,
func,vfs} to resolve cross-crate type mismatches from concurrent
agent development:

- fsqlite-vdbe: SorterRow/SqliteValue API alignment, insert_row arity
- fsqlite-types: value.rs and record.rs updates
- fsqlite-mvcc: lifecycle Arc<HashMap>, core_types, and 15 other modules
- fsqlite-btree: cursor and balance refinements
- fsqlite-core: connection FK update path, raptorq cleanup
- fsqlite-vfs: memory.rs Error type fix

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
